case_title: STEVEN BAILEY et al VS. DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY INC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-26-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE JAN-19-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-07-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY INC

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAILEY, STEVEN KOPILOW, DEBORAH A LAWRENCE, MAURICE L MANNING, WILSON BARLOW AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY INC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-04-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-19-2009

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-19-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-04-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AGAISNT DEFT; DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAILEY, STEVEN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAILEY, STEVEN KOPILOW, DEBORAH A LAWRENCE, MAURICE L MANNING, WILSON BARLOW SERVED JUL-23-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY INC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAILEY, STEVEN KOPILOW, DEBORAH A LAWRENCE, MAURICE L MANNING, WILSON BARLOW ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 HOURS
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR JUN-07-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON FEB-26-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-07-2010. CASE SETTLED PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CASE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON SEP-07-2010 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
